stemHtml:
Refer to figure or ALICANTE - Chart 10-3 from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Departing on SID ASTRO 4A, you are cleared to FL80, with a restriction to maintain 2000 ft until passing ALT VOR. The QNH is 1040 hPa, the aircraft climbs with an average ROC of 800 ft/min, and the ground speed is 133 kt.

When will you reach the top of climb (ToC)? Approximately...
